flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Western Wyoming Community College rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.6k → $10.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Western Wyoming Community College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.6k → $4.2k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Western Wyoming Community College fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (38.5% → 32.5%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Western Wyoming Community College rose 10% between 2017 and 2020 ($8.2k → $9.0k).
